headline: Earn up to $450 with tiered direct deposits after opening a Smartly Checking account.
requiredActions: Open a new U.S. Bank Smartly Checking account via the promotion page.
Fund the account with at least $25 within 30 days.
Enroll in online banking or the U.S. Bank Mobile App within 90 days.
Receive two or more qualifying direct deposits totaling at least $2,000 within 90 days.
notes: Offer validity and footprint reflected in public summaries updated in February-March 2026.

headline: Earn $325 with qualifying direct deposits after opening a new Everyday Checking account.
requiredActions: Open a new Wells Fargo Everyday Checking account through the promotion page or in branch with code.
Receive at least $1,000 in qualifying direct deposits within 90 days.
Keep the account open and above $0 through bonus payout.
notes: Wells Fargo's official bonus page advertised the $325 Everyday Checking offer through April 14, 2026 when re-verified on March 29, 2026.

headline: Earn $400 after opening eligible BMO checking and meeting direct deposit requirements.
apyDisplay: Varies by account: Relationship 0.01% APY; Smart Money/Advantage no APY
requiredActions: Open a new BMO Smart Advantage Checking, Smart Money Checking, or Relationship Checking account with the promo code.
Receive qualifying direct deposits totaling at least $4,000 within 90 days.
Keep the account in good standing through payout.
notes: BMO's official personal checking promo page advertised the $400 offer through May 4, 2026 when re-verified on March 29, 2026.

headline: Earn $250 after opening 360 Checking and receiving qualifying direct deposits.
apyDisplay: Interest-bearing; APY varies by balance tier
requiredActions: Open a new 360 Checking account using promo code CHECKING250.
Receive at least two direct deposits of at least $500 each within 75 days of opening.
notes: Offer listed as ongoing as of March 1, 2026.

headline: Earn up to $350 with a new Chime Checking Account through a $50 direct-deposit bonus plus up to $300 in 90-day cash back.
requiredActions: Open a new Chime Checking Account through the official promo page as a first-time Chime account holder.
Receive a single qualifying direct deposit of at least $500 within 34 days of account opening to earn the $50 direct-deposit reward.
Activate a physical Chime Visa card within 14 days of receiving the qualifying direct deposit.
Make eligible Chime card purchases to earn 10% cash back, up to $100 per month for 90 days after account opening.
notes: Chime's official promo page and terms currently advertise this offer through May 27, 2026. The terms say eligibility requires receiving the invitation/advertisement from Chime and enrolling through the promo landing page.

headline: Earn $400 after opening Chase Total Checking and receiving direct deposits.
requiredActions: Open a new Chase Total Checking account with an eligible coupon.
Receive direct deposits totaling at least $1,000 within 90 days of coupon enrollment.
Keep the account open and unrestricted at payout.
notes: Chase's official Total Checking offer page currently advertises the $400 bonus through July 15, 2026.

headline: Earn $125 by completing qualifying transactions on a new Chase Secure Banking account.
requiredActions: Open a new Chase Secure Banking account with an eligible coupon.
Complete 10 qualifying transactions within 60 days of coupon enrollment (for example debit purchases, ACH credits, QuickDeposit, online bill pay, or Zelle).

bankName: E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley Private Bank
headline: Earn up to $2,000 with large new deposits in E*TRADE Premium Savings.
requiredActions: Open a new E*TRADE Premium Savings account and enter promo code SAVE26 by the offer deadline.
Fund the account within 30 days of opening.
Maintain qualifying balances for at least 45 additional days after the initial funding window.
notes: E*TRADE's official savings promotion flow was no longer live when re-verified on March 29, 2026 after the March 11, 2026 enrollment deadline.

headline: Earn up to $500 with tiered qualifying direct deposits in a new eligible checking account.
apyDisplay: Varies by account: Relationship earns interest; Plus/SafeBalance do not
requiredActions: Open a new eligible Bank of America Advantage Banking checking account through the bonus page.
Receive qualifying direct deposits totaling at least $2,000 within 90 days for the first bonus tier.
Hit higher direct deposit tiers ($5,000 and $10,000) for larger payouts.
notes: Bank of America's Advantage Banking flow still appeared to be the official public path on March 29, 2026, but the bonus terms remain partially gated behind ZIP or application state and should be re-confirmed in a full browser before the next refresh.

headline: Earn up to $400 with qualifying direct deposits after opening a new Virtual Wallet account.
apyDisplay: Interest-bearing; APY varies by market and product mix
requiredActions: Open a new Virtual Wallet product through the offer page.
Receive qualifying direct deposits within 60 days ($500+ for Virtual Wallet, $5,000+ for Virtual Wallet with Performance Select).
Keep the account open through reward posting.
notes: Current public offer window runs through May 28, 2026.

bankName: E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley Private Bank
headline: Earn $300 with qualifying direct deposits into a new E*TRADE Checking or Max-Rate Checking account.
requiredActions: Open a new E*TRADE Checking or Max-Rate Checking account using promo code CHECKING25.
Receive at least two direct deposits of at least $1,500 each within 90 days.
Keep the account in good standing through payout.
notes: E*TRADE's official checking promo page currently advertises the $300 bonus through May 31, 2026.

headline: Earn up to $3,000 with large new-money deposits into eligible Chase Private Client accounts.
requiredActions: Open or upgrade to a Chase Private Client Checking account with an offer code by July 15, 2026.
Transfer at least $150,000 in eligible new money within 45 days.
Maintain the qualifying new-money balance for at least 90 days after enrollment.
notes: Chase's official Private Client bonus page currently advertises the up-to-$3,000 offer through July 15, 2026.

offerName: Checking and Savings Direct Deposit Bonus
headline: Earn up to $300 after receiving qualifying direct deposits in a new SoFi Checking and Savings account.
requiredActions: Open a new SoFi Checking and Savings account.
Receive at least one eligible direct deposit.
Accumulate at least $1,000 in eligible direct deposits during the first 25-day direct deposit bonus period for a payout (or $5,000+ for the top tier).

offerName: Regular Checking Enhanced Direct Deposit Bonus
headline: Earn $325 by opening eligible Citi checking and completing enhanced direct deposit requirements.
requiredActions: Open a new eligible Citi checking account and enroll in the bonus offer before the deadline.
Complete at least two Enhanced Direct Deposits totaling at least $3,000 within 90 days.
Keep the account open and in good standing through the 90-to-120-day payout window.
notes: Offer deadline widely published as April 13, 2026 for the $325 enhanced-direct-deposit tier.

headline: Earn $100 for consistent monthly saving activity in a new Ultimate Opportunity Savings account.
requiredActions: Open a new Ultimate Opportunity Savings account through the promotional page.
Deposit at least $100 within 30 days.
Deposit or transfer at least $100 monthly for the next 11 consecutive months.
Maintain an average daily balance of at least $100 and end the 12-month period with at least $1,200 in the account.

headline: Earn $200 after opening TD Complete Checking and receiving qualifying direct deposits.
requiredActions: Open a new TD Complete Checking account through the promotional page.
Receive at least $500 in qualifying direct deposits within 60 days of account opening.
notes: TD published this offer with an end date of April 30, 2026.

headline: Earn $300 after opening TD Beyond Checking and meeting direct deposit requirements.
requiredActions: Open a new TD Beyond Checking account through the promotional page.
Receive at least $2,500 in qualifying direct deposits within 60 days of account opening.
notes: TD published this offer with an end date of April 30, 2026.

headline: Earn $300 with Key Smart Checking after qualifying direct deposits.
requiredActions: Open a new Key Smart Checking account with offer code KDMA0226 by the published deadline.
Make the $10 minimum opening deposit.
Receive at least $2,000 in eligible direct deposits within 90 days of account opening.
notes: KeyBank lists this promotional window through May 22, 2026 and payout within 60 days after qualification.

headline: Earn $500 with Key Select Checking after qualifying direct deposits.
requiredActions: Open a new Key Select Checking account with offer code KDMB0226 by the published deadline.
Make the $50 minimum opening deposit.
Receive at least $5,000 in eligible direct deposits within 90 days of account opening.
notes: KeyBank lists this promotional window through May 22, 2026 and payout within 60 days after qualification.

headline: Earn $400 by opening Truist One Checking online and completing deposit and debit activity requirements.
requiredActions: Open a new Truist One Checking account online and enroll with promo code DC400TR1Q226 by July 9, 2026.
Receive at least two qualifying direct deposits totaling at least $2,000 within 120 days of account opening.
Complete at least 20 qualifying debit card purchases within 120 days of account opening.
notes: Truist's official account-opening page currently advertises the Truist One Checking $400 online offer through July 9, 2026 with promo code DC400TR1Q226.

headline: Earn up to $1,500 by enrolling and maintaining qualifying new balances in Marcus Online Savings.
requiredActions: Enroll a Marcus Online Savings account in the cash bonus offer by the published deadline.
Deposit at least $100,000 in eligible new funds within the 10-day funding period for the top bonus tier.
Maintain the required balance for the 90-day maintenance period.
notes: Marcus's official savings bonus page explicitly stated that the offer ended on March 11, 2026 when re-verified on March 29, 2026.

headline: Earn $400 with a new Huntington Perks Checking account after direct deposit qualification.
requiredActions: Open a new Huntington Perks Checking account with your promotion code by June 15, 2026.
Receive a qualifying direct deposit of at least $500 within 90 days.
Keep the account open through bonus payout.
notes: Huntington's official personal checking promotions page currently advertises the Perks Checking $400 offer through June 15, 2026.

headline: Earn $600 with a new Huntington Platinum Perks Checking account after qualifying new-money deposits.
requiredActions: Open a new Huntington Platinum Perks Checking account with your promotion code by June 15, 2026.
Make cumulative new-money deposits of at least $25,000 within 90 days.
Keep the account open through bonus payout.
notes: Huntington's official personal checking promotions page currently advertises the Platinum Perks $600 offer through June 15, 2026.
